children.name: CPU_CNT
children.title: System CPU count: 1: single core, 2: dual core, etc.

children.name: OBJDUMP
children.title: whether Objdump -d elf to lst or not

children.help: build version depend on sdk, it's DEBUG in developer environment, RELEASE in customer environment.
children.name: BUILD_DEFAULT_VERSION
children.title: Use default build version

children.help:
This option is used to reduce ble stack size for IoT scenarios that
only use ble provisioning network.It supports two ble advertise,
one ble link, and ble scan at the same time.it does not support SMP and central role.
when config this option,BLUETOOTH_BLE_SLAVE_ONLY will be invalid.
children.name: BLUETOOTH_RELEASE_CODESIZE
children.title: reduce ble stack size

children.name: BLUETOOTH_BLE_SLAVE_OBSERVER
children.title: only supports ble slave and observer

children.name: BLUETOOTH_BLE_DISCOVER_AUTO
children.title: auto ble discover. Only used when single ble host

children.help:
set log compile and default print level, log level map:
0 BK_LOG_NONE, no log output.
1 BK_LOG_ERROR, output error level or above
2 BK_LOG_WARN, output warning level or above
3 BK_LOG_INFO, output info level or above
4 BK_LOG_DEBUG, output debug level or above
5 BK_LOG_VERBOSE, output debug level or above
6 BK_LOG_DEFAULT, BK_LOG_INFO in release version, BK_LOG_DEBUG in debug version
children.name: LOG_LEVEL
children.title: Set LOG LEVEL

children.title: Enable Wifi CLI Raw Link enable

children.help: Enable Shell and Async log optimize
children.name: SHELL_ASYNCLOG
children.title: Enable Shell Asynclog

children.name: DL_QSPI_UART_PORT
children.title: Config uart port to download qspi flash

children.name: PM_LV_TIME_COST_DEBUG
children.title: Enable low voltage sleep time cost debug

children.name: PM_LV_WDT_PROTECTION
children.title: add protection for hardware enter low voltage fail when application abnormal operate, using wdt to reboot

children.help:
when initialising psram memory,its contents are 
automatically zeroed.
children.name: PSRAM_HEAP_INIT_SET_ZERO
children.title: Set psram content zero

children.name: TASK_STACK_IN_PSRAM
children.title: Create FreeRTOS Task stack in psram

children.help:
Allow call some OS API in irq disabled, and scheduler will not enable
the irq but left the user app to restore previous irq status.
children.name: FREERTOS_ALLOW_OS_API_IN_IRQ_DISABLED
children.title: Allow Call OS API in IRQ disabled

children.help: System tick count per second, can be 1-1000
children.name: FREERTOS_TICK_RATE_HZ
children.title: Set FreeRTOS tick count per second

children.help:
when turn on the marco,the current task TCB information
will be added every time the software timer command is sent
children.name: BK_OS_TIMER_DEBUG
children.title: Enable OS timer Debug

children.help: set OS adapter layer timer Debug count value
children.name: RTOS_TIMER_DEBUG_CNT
children.title: OS adapter layer timer Debug count value

children.help:
when turn on the marco, the System will output timer related
debug information
children.name: DEBUG_RTOS_TIMER
children.title: Enable OS adapter layer timer Debug

children.help:
Enabling this marco allows you to output CPU utilization over 
a specified period via commands,with the duration being configurable
(e.g.,5 seconds, 10 seconds,etc.).
children.name: FREERTOS_HISTORY_CPU_PERCENT
children.title: Enable FreeRTOS CPU usage percent record

children.help:
When this marco is enabled, the task name will be set as constant string.
and the incoming parameters are directly used internally, not copied.
children.name: USE_STATIC_TASK_NAME
children.title: Use Static Task Name

children.help:
When the task name used the native method of FreeRTOS,the
task name is copied, and this marco can be configured to 
set the maximum length of the task name.
children.name: DYNAMIC_TASK_NAME_LEN
children.title: set Dynamic Task Name Len

children.help: set memory debug function name length
children.name: MEM_DEBUG_FUNC_NAME_LEN
children.title: Set Mem Debug Func Name Len

children.help: set memory debug task name length
children.name: MEM_DEBUG_TASK_NAME_LEN
children.title: Set Mem Debug Task Name Len

children.help:
When this option is enable, more memory will be consumed because
a fixed length debug block will be appended to every memory allocated
from heap.
Moreover, suggest disable task/watchdog when this option is enabled
in case os_dump_memory_stats() triggers watchdog.
children.name: MEM_DEBUG
children.title: Enable Mem Debug

children.name: MEM_OVERFLOW_FREE_RECORD_MAX
children.title: Set memory overflow free record len

children.name: MEM_OVERFLOW_MALLOC_RECORD_MAX
children.title: Set memory overflow malloc record len

children.name: MEM_OVERFLOW_FREELIST_RECORD_MAX
children.title: Set memory overflow freelist record len

children.help: stack size of application main task
children.name: APP_MAIN_TASK_STACK_SIZE
children.title: Set App Main Task Stack Size

children.help: Don't disable it when WiFi-6 is enabled.
children.name: WIFI4
children.title: Enable Wifi4

children.help: Don't disable it when WiFi-6 is enabled.
children.name: WIFI5
children.title: Enable Wifi5

children.help: Don't disable it when WiFi-6 is enabled.
children.name: WIFI6E
children.title: Enable Wifi6e

children.name: CONNECT_THROUGH_PSK_OR_SAE_PASSWORD
children.title: Enable connect through psk or sae password

children.name: AP_STATYPE_LIMIT
children.title: Enable Ap mode Sta Type Limit

children.name: RECEIVE_BCMC_IN_DTIM10
children.title: Enable Station to Receive BCMC frame in Dtim10

children.name: NOT_CHECK_SSID_CHANGE
children.title: Enable not check beacon ssid changes

children.help: Priority of WiFi kernel message task
children.name: WIFI_KMSG_TASK_PRIO
children.title: Set WiFi Kmsg Task Prio

children.help: Stack size of WiFi kernel message task
children.name: WIFI_KMSG_TASK_STACK_SIZE
children.title: Set Wifi Kmsg Task Stack Size

children.help: Stack size of WiFi core task
children.name: WIFI_CORE_TASK_STACK_SIZE
children.title: Set Wifi Core Task Stack Size

children.help: Enable Software Transmit Queue, recommend to enable this feature
children.name: RWNX_SW_TXQ
children.title: Enable RWNX SW TXQ

children.name: RWNX_MULTIPLE_SSID_STA_MODE
children.title: Enable RWNX MULTIPLE SSID STA MODE

children.name: BK_MEM_DYNA_APPLY_EN
children.title: Enable BK Mem Dyna Apply En

children.help:
Skip WiFi Join Network procedure to reduct network connection time
when supplicant passes beacon ies to Umac.
children.name: RWNX_FAST_CONNECT
children.title: Enable WiFi Fast Connect

children.name: WIFI_MAC_SUPPORT_STAS_MAX_NUM
children.title: Set Wifi MAC Support STAs Max Num

children.name: WIFI_CP_IPC
children.title: Enable Wi-Fi Communication Processor IPC interface

children.name: WIFI_VNET_CONTROLLER
children.title: Wi-Fi works as virtual network controller

children.name: CONTROLLER_RX_DIRECT_PSH
children.title: Controller RX Buf Directly push to AP

children.name: CONTROLLER_WAR
children.title: Controller RX Buf Directly push to AP

children.name: CONTROLLER_AP_BUFFER_COPY
children.title: Controller AP buffer copy to CP buffer when AP use PSRAM instead of SRAM

children.help: Enable ACK_NOW if MQTT is open
children.name: MQTT_ACK_NOW
children.title: Enable Mqtt Ack Now

children.name: LWIP_MEMP_MEM_MALLOC
children.title: memp_alloc() use mem_malloc/mem_free instead of the lwip pool allocator

children.help:
Set UDP receive mail box size. The recommended value is 24.

UDP receive mail box is a per socket mail box, when the application receives packets
from UDP socket, LWIP core firstly posts the packets to UDP receive mail box and the
application then fetches the packets from mail box. It means LWIP can caches maximum
UDP_RECCVMBOX_SIZE packets for each UDP socket, so the maximum possible cached UDP 
packets for all UDP sockets is UDP_RECCVMBOX_SIZE multiples the maximum UDP socket 
number. In other words, the bigger UDP_RECVMBOX_SIZE means more memory.On the other 
hand, if the receiv mail box is too small, the mail box may be full. If the mail box
is full, the LWIP drops the packets.So generally we need to make sure the UDP 
receive mail box is big enough to avoid packet drop between LWIP core and application.
children.name: LWIP_UDP_RECVMBOX_SIZE
children.title: Default UDP receive mail box size

children.help: Set the size of the heap memory. The recommended value is 51200 .
children.name: LWIP_MEM_SIZE
children.title: Default size of the LWIP heap memory

children.help:
Set the size of the max memory rx used. The recommended value is 
38400 ((LWIP_MEM_SIZE*3)/4).
children.name: LWIP_MEM_MAX_RX_SIZE
children.title: Default size of the max memory rx used

children.help:
Set the size of the max memory tx used. The recommended value is 
42666 ((LWIP_MEM_SIZE*5)/6).
If the application will send a lot of data 
that needs to be copied, this should be set high.
children.name: LWIP_MEM_MAX_TX_SIZE
children.title: Default the size of the max memory tx used

children.help:
Set maximum segment size for TCP transmission.

Can be set lower to save RAM, the max value 1460(ipv4)/1440(ipv6) will
give best throughput.
IPv4 TCP_MSS Range: 576 <= TCP_MSS <= 1460
IPv6 TCP_MSS Range: 1220<= TCP_mSS <= 1440
children.name: LWIP_TCP_MSS
children.title: Maximum Segment Size (MSS)

children.help:
Set default send buffer size for new TCP sockets.

Per-socket send buffer size can be changed at runtime
with lwip_setsockopt(s, TCP_SNDBUF, ...).

This value must be at least 2x the MSS size, and the default
is 4x the default MSS size.

Setting a smaller default SNDBUF size can save some RAM, but
will decrease performance.
children.name: LWIP_TCP_SND_BUF
children.title: Default send buffer size

children.help:
Set default TCP receive window size for new TCP sockets.

Per-socket receive window size can be changed at runtime
with lwip_setsockopt(s, TCP_WINDOW, ...).

Setting a smaller default receive window size can save some RAM,
but will significantly decrease performance.
children.name: LWIP_TCP_WND
children.title: Default receive window size

children.help:
Set the number of struct netbufs.
(only needed if you use the sequential API, like api_lib.c)
This number corresponds to the maximum number of active sockets at any
given point in time. This number must be sum of max.
children.name: LWIP_MEMP_NUM_NETBUF
children.title: Default number of struct netbufs

children.help:
Set the size of each pbuf in the pbuf pool. The default is
designed to accomodate single full size TCP frame in one pbuf, 
including TCP_MSS, IP header, and link header.
children.name: LWIP_PBUF_POOL_SIZE
children.title: Default number of buffers in the pbuf pool

children.help:
Set TCP sender buffer space (pbufs).
This must be at least as much as (2 * TCP_SND_BUF/TCP_MSS) for 
things to work.
children.name: LWIP_TCP_SND_QUEUELEN
children.title: Default TCP sender buffer space (pbufs)

children.help:
Set the number of simultaneously queued TCP segments. 
(requires the LWIP_TCP option)
as much as (2 * LWIP_TCP_SND_QUEUELEN) for things to work.
children.name: LWIP_MEMP_NUM_TCP_SEG
children.title: Default simultaneously queued TCP segments

children.help:
Configure a reasonable default TCP PCB RTO (Recovery Time Objective) time
as the initial RTO time. In different network environments,
the RTO timeout can be configured according to the quality
of the network environment,The default parameter value is 3000.
children.name: LWIP_TCP_RTO_TIMEOUT
children.title: Default TCP rto timeout

children.help:
The configuration can enable TCP fast retransmission, 
with macro configuration set to default as enabled. 
If disabled, the default SYN retransmission count is set to 6 times, 
and the TCP initial pcb_rto time is set to default as 3000 milliseconds (3 seconds).
children.name: LWIP_TCP_FAST_RETRANSMISSION
children.title: TCP Fast Retransmissions

children.help: Set maximum number of retransmissions of SYN segments.
children.name: LWIP_TCP_SYNMAXRTX
children.title: Maximum number of retransmissions of SYN segments

children.help:
It a term related to the TCP (Transmission Control Protocol) 
implementation in networking. TCP will queue segments that arrive out of order.
Define to 0 if your device is low on memory.
children.name: LWIP_TCP_QUEUE_OOSEQ
children.title: Stands for Out-of-Order Sequence Queue

children.help: Set the stacksize of tcpip thread.
children.name: LWIP_TCPIP_THREAD_STACKSIZE
children.title: Default stacksize of tcpip thread

children.help: control PSA interface cli testing code
children.name: PSA_MBEDTLS_TEST
children.title: Enable psa interface test

children.help: mbedtls is implemented using hardware acceleration trustengine
children.name: TRUSTENGINE
children.title: Enable hardware crypto engine

children.help: mbedtls is implemented using pure software
children.name: SW_CRYPTO
children.title: Enable software crypto

children.help: tls use PSA interface to implement encryption
children.name: MBEDTLS_USE_PSA_CRYPTO
children.title: Enable use PSA crypto

children.help: mbedtls support more algorithms(enabled in xxx_config.h)
children.name: FULL_MBEDTLS
children.title: Enable Full Mbedtls

children.help: Use Sigma Delta ADC to detect temperature
children.name: SDMADC_TEMP
children.title: Enable Sdmadc temp

children.help: When WPA3 is enabled, the PMF should be enabled also!
children.name: WPA3
children.title: Enable WPA3

children.help:
Enable softap WPA3 SAE. This may costs some code size. Use mbedtls as
the crypto suite may accelerate ECC caculation speed.
children.name: SOFTAP_WPA3
children.title: Enable Softap WPA3

children.help:
Prefer WPA2 instead of WPA3 if BSS in WPA3 transition mode.
WPA2(prefer to use non-mfp) will be used instead of wpa3-sae if bss is
in WPA3 transistion mode, and wpa3 always sets to mfp capable to avoid
disconnection with reason code set to "Robust managment frame policy
viloation (0x001f)" even if bss sets mfp required bit to 0 (No Required).
This feature eliminates AP's SA query prodecure and reduces connecting time
with AP.
children.name: WPA2_PREFER_TO_SAE
children.title: Enable WPA2 Prefer To Sae

children.help:
Enable STA auto reconnect feature.
Supplicant automatically reconnect with AP if connection fails or disconnected
by AP. When this function is enabled, users can set auto reconnect max retry count
and reconnect timeout, and enable or disable auto reconnect when disconnected by AP
if STA is in COMPLETE state.
children.name: STA_AUTO_RECONNECT
children.title: Enable STA Auto Reconnect

children.help:
use mbedtls as tls transport.
Use mbedtls as the crypto suite may accelerate ECC caculation speed.
children.name: USE_MBEDTLS
children.title: Enable MBEDTLS

children.help:
PSK cache enable.
Caculate psk in advance, and store it in memory. Recommended to enable if 
no hw accelerator exists.
children.name: WPA_PSK_CACHE
children.title: Enable WPA PSK Cache

children.help: connect to AP after psk is caculated
children.name: SELECT_NETWORK_AFTER_PSK_SET
children.title: Enable Select Network After PSK Set

children.help: change CPU freq when do SAE process
children.name: SAE_OVERCLOCK
children.title: Enable SAE Overclock

children.help:
fast connect with scan.
wpa_supplicant will use beacon/probersp IEs from fci, and connect with
AP without any scan.
children.name: WLAN_FAST_CONNECT_WITHOUT_SCAN
children.title: Enable Wlan Fast Connect Without Scan

children.help:
send deauth to AP before connect with AP.
Recommend to enable if AP enables MFP. deauth frame is sent in encryted or
unencrypt format to AP according to pmf value from fci.
children.name: WLAN_FAST_CONNECT_DEAUTH_FIRST
children.title: Enable Wlan Fast Connect Default First

children.help:
WPA3 fast connect support.
After STA has connected with AP, fci will stores additional pmk, pmkid, and
after reboot, supplicant will use open auth algo instread of sae. Recommends
to enable WLAN_FAST_CONNECT_DEAUTH_FIRST.
children.name: WLAN_FAST_CONNECT_WPA3
children.title: Enable Wlan Fast Connect WPA3

children.help:
fci encryption method.
1 for NULL, 2 for XOR, 3 for AES.
children.name: FAST_CONNECT_INFO_ENC_METHOD
children.title: Enable Fast Connect Info Enc Method

children.name: AP_STATYPE_LIMIT
children.title: Enable Ap mode Sta Type Limit num

children.help: Dump all memory when exception happen
children.name: DUMP_ENABLE
children.title: Enable Dump Feature

children.help: Dump all memory when exception happen
children.name: MEMDUMP_ALL
children.title: Enable Memdump All

children.help: The value should be changed if print size is more than 128
children.name: PRINTF_BUF_SIZE
children.title: Print Buffer Size

children.help: This will set kfifo size when software uses kfifo to cache data receiving.
children.name: KFIFO_SIZE
children.title: Kfifo Size

children.name: UART_TX_DMA
children.title: Enable UART tx dma copy data support,special feature used for UART TX data. 			When erase Flash, CPU can't get instructions from flash then it can't work, 			so DMA copy data from RAM to UART FIFO

children.name: UART_RX_DMA
children.title: Enable UART rx dma copy data support,special feature used for UART RX data. 		      When erase Flash, CPU can't get instructions from flash then it can't work, 		      so DMA copy data from UART FIFO to RAM

children.help: This will reset kfifo size of "CONFIG_KFIFO_SIZE" when software enable rx dma.
children.name: UART_RX_DMA_KFIFO_SIZE
children.title: Kfifo Size

children.name: UART_PM_CB_SUPPORT
children.title: Enable UART enter low voltage callback support

children.help: This is for super deep sleep
children.name: RTC_ANA_WAKEUP_SUPPORT
children.title: Enable RTC wakeup system from analog channel

children.name: GPIO_DYNAMIC_WAKEUP_SUPPORT
children.title: Enable GPIO dynamic config to wake system if at low volatage status

children.name: GPIO_WAKEUP_DEBUG
children.title: Enable GPIO wakeup module debug code

children.name: GPIO_WAKEUP_SUPPORT
children.title: Enable GPIO WAKEUP system if at low voltage status

children.help: The value should be changed if need more then 4 gpio
children.name: GPIO_DYNAMIC_WAKEUP_SOURCE_MAX_CNT
children.title: how many gpio can dynamic set to wakeup system at low power status

children.help: Only one port is supported for now
children.name: CONFIG_GPIO_WAKEUP_ID
children.title: specific port for GPIO wakeup

children.help:
0: set gpio as low level intterrupt type
1: set gpio as high level intterrupt type
2: set gpio as rising edge intterrupt type
3: set gpio as falling edge intterrupt type
children.name: CONFIG_GPIO_WAKEUP_INT_TYPE
children.title: which intterupt type for GPIO wakeup

children.name: GPIO_SIMULATE_UART_WRITE
children.title: Enable GPIO simulate uart write data

children.help: This is for super deep sleep
children.name: GPIO_ANA_WAKEUP_SUPPORT
children.title: Enable GPIO wakeup system from analog channel

children.help: If not open, gpio could not keep state when the always on power domain is off
children.name: GPIO_RETENTION_SUPPORT
children.title: Enable GPIO retention for (super) deep sleep and soft reset

children.name: GPIO_RETENTION_DISPOSABLE
children.title: Decide GPIO retention is disposable or permanent

children.name: USR_GPIO_CFG_EN
children.title: Enable user-defined GPIO config for each project

children.name: GPIO_DUMP_MAP_DEV_DEBUG
children.title: Enable GPIO MAP DEV DEBUG CODE

children.help:
Enable GPIO_10 as the default wakeup source.
When set to 'n', you need to define GPIO_STATIC_WAKEUP_SOURCE_MAP in usr_gpio_cfg.h
to configure custom wakeup source mapping.
Note: This configuration table is only supported on the CP side.
children.name: DEFAULT_WAKEUP_SOURCE
children.title: GPIO_10 as default wakeup source

children.help:
Specify the GPIO pin number for LDO 3.3V control.
Customers should configure the GPIO according to their circuit's LDO pin,
otherwise some peripherals may not work properly.
Set to 255 to disable this feature.
children.name: LDO3V3_CTRL_GPIO
children.title: GPIO pin for LDO 3.3V control

children.help: The value should be changed if need more then 4 gpio.
children.name: GPIO_DYNAMIC_KEEP_STATUS_MAX_CNT
children.title: how many gpio can dynamic set to keep io status at low power status

children.help:
Current CPU-CORE software system uses how many dma-logic-channels.
Total of all CPU-COREs dma logic chan count should be not bigger than total dma hardware supported channels.
children.name: DMA_LOGIC_CHAN_CNT
children.title: DMA logic channel count

children.help:
Current CPU-CORE software system min dma-logic-channel-id.
Be careful not to overlap with other CPU-CORE software system's dma-logic-channel-id.
The value should be set like this:
  CPU0 is from 0
  CPU1 is from CPU0_DMA_LOGIC_CHAN_CNT
children.name: DMA_LOGIC_CHAN_ID_MIN
children.title: DMA logic channel ID minimum

children.name: PSRAM_AUTO_DETECT
children.title: Enable PSRAM id auto detect function

children.name: LDO_SELF_LOW_POWER_MODE_ENA
children.title: Enable LDO self low power mode

children.help: 0 indicates that all IDs are supported by default, no configuration required
children.name: TIMER_SUPPORT_ID_BITS
children.title: timer support id bits

children.name: TIMER_PM_CB_SUPPORT
children.title: Enable TIMER enter low voltage callback support

children.name: FLASH_PARTITION_CHECK_VALID
children.title: Enable flash driver check write permission and address range

children.name: FLASH_BYPASS_OTP_OPERATION
children.title: Bypass flash to operate otp in flash

children.name: BAKP_POWER_DOMAIN_PM_CONTROL
children.title: used for PM control of bakp domain power on and off

children.name: ROSC_COMPENSATION
children.title: enable rosc compensation for rtc tick

children.help: Set Low power voltage default value 0.6v(0.45+0.025*6)
children.name: LP_VOL
children.title: Set Low power voltage value

children.help: config the 26M crystal hardware stability time
children.name: PM_26M_STABILITY_DELAY_TIME_HARDWARE
children.title: 26M CRYSTAL HARDWARE STABILITY DELAY TIME

children.name: PM_LV_SUBCORES_ON
children.title: CPU0 and CPU1,CPU2 ON when enter low voltage

children.name: PM_LV_GPIO_WAKEUP_CALL_MAC_CB
children.title: when gpio wakeup , call mac callback when lv sleep mode

children.name: PM_PSRAM_FORCE_ON
children.title: force on psram when enter low voltage

children.name: PM_AP_POWERDOWN_WHEN_LV
children.title: Power down ap when low voltage sleep

children.help: Use OTP to save rfcali data
children.name: PHY_RFCALI_TO_OTP
children.title: Enable rfcali_to_otp

children.name: SLAVE_HEART_BEAT
children.title: Enable heartbeat mechanism when dual core communication

children.name: SPINLOCK_SECTION
children.title: Enable SPINLOCK special section,only SMP needs to enble it

children.name: SPINLOCK_DYNAMIC_CNT
children.title: How many spinlocks maybe dynamic allocated by the system

children.name: SPINLOCK_STATIC_CNT
children.title: How many spinlocks maybe static allocated by the system

children.help:
BEKEN Chip sets QSPI interface as a master device, the slave device is a flash,
then BEKEN Chip can access the flash with QSPI interface.
The application can read/writes data to flash directly by QSPI Flash API,
or reads/writes by file system API if enable relates macro, I.E. CONFIG_FATFS, CONFIG_LITTLEFS, CONFIG_VFS...
children.name: QSPI_MST_FLASH
children.title: Enable QSPI Flash

children.help: The value should be changed if need to change qspi line mode
children.name: QSPI_LINE_MODE
children.title: qspi line mode choose

children.name: ANA_REG_WRITE_POLL_REG_B
children.title: Write analog register polls sys reg0xb

children.name: BT_REUSE_MEDIA_MEMORY
children.title: BT reuse media memory at beging of cpu1
